title: procedure-annotator/temporal
description: JEAB Procedure category, temporal sub-annotator. Declares session-level temporal structure: time units, warm-up intervals, and algorithmic parameters.

clock.description: Time unit declaration for the session.

warmup.description: Session warm-up period before schedule activation.

duration.description: Warm-up duration in the session's clock unit

algorithm.description: Schedule value generation algorithm. Specifies how interval/ratio values are generated for variable schedules.
algorithm.reference: Fleshler, M., & Hoffman, H. S. (1962). A progression for generating variable-interval schedules. Journal of the Experimental Analysis of Behavior, 5(4), 529-530.
